column1: This Excel workbook contains all Online Data Tables for the paper "Where is the Land of Opportunity? The Geography of Intergenerational Mobility in the United States"
The workbook contains the following worksheets.
Online Data Table 1: National 100 by 100 transition matrix
Online Data Table 2: National marginal income distributions by centile
Online Data Table 3: Intergenerational Mobility Statistics by County
Online Data Table 4: Intergenerational Mobility Statistics by Metropolitan Statistical Area
Online Data Table 5: Intergenerational Mobility Statistics by Commuting Zone
Online Data Table 6: Quintile-Quintile Transition Matrices by Commuting Zone
Online Data Table 7: Income Distributions by Commuting Zone
Online Data Table 8: Commuting Zone Characteristics
Online Data Table 9: Commuting Zone Characteristics Definitions and Data Sources
